graphdb_rdf.metric_question: On which two articles of the Treaty on the Functioning of the European Union (TFEU) is this Regulation based?
graphdb_rdf.metric_answer: The EU AI Act is based on Article 114 of the Treaty on the Functioning of the European Union (TFEU). The information retrieved does not specify the second article. If you need further details or verification, I can perform additional searches.
